docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERCARGO INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD PACIFIC CONTAINER (USA), INC. STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FANT PHILIP. HEARING SET FOR NOV-08-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-08-2000, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY PHILIP A FANT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-23-2000 CONTINUED FROM NOV-08-2000 TO JAN-31-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-31-2001, TO FILE STATEMENT RE; STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY. TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY PHILIP A FANT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-2001 CONTINUED FROM JAN-31-2001 TO MAY-16-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT RE STATUS OF BANKRUPTCY. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY PHILIP A FANT. HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-19-2001, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY PHILIP A FANT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-04-2001 CONTINUED FROM SEP-19-2001 TO JAN-30-2002 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2002, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-30-2002, TO FILE POS; AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-14-2002 CONTINUED FROM JAN-30-2002 TO MAY-29-2002 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
